questions.question: How much VRAM does a 70B parameter model in FP16 require just for weights?
questions.questionZh: 一个采用半精度浮点数 (FP16) 格式的 700亿参数模型 (70B parameter model) 仅存储权重 (weights) 就需要多少显存 (VRAM)？
optionsZh: 35 GB
70 GB
140 GB
280 GB
questions.explanation: 70 billion parameters * 2 bytes per FP16 parameter = 140 billion bytes = 140 GB. This exceeds a single A100 (80GB), requiring at least two GPUs just to load the weights.
questions.explanationZh: 700亿参数 (parameters) * 每个FP16参数2字节 = 1400亿字节 = 140 GB。这超出了单张A100 (80GB) 的容量，仅加载权重 (weights) 就至少需要两张GPU。

questions.question: What is quantization in the context of LLMs?
questions.questionZh: 在大语言模型（Large Language Models, LLMs）的语境中，什么是量化（Quantization）？
options: Reducing the numerical precision of weights (e.g., FP16 to INT4) to decrease memory usage and increase inference speed
optionsZh: 移除未使用的模型层 (Model Layers)
降低权重（Weights）的数值精度（Numerical Precision）（例如从 FP16 降至 INT4），以减少内存占用（Memory Usage）并提升推理速度（Inference Speed）
压缩训练数据 (training data)
缩减词表大小 (Vocabulary Size)
questions.explanation: Quantization maps high-precision floating point weights to lower-precision integers. INT4 quantization stores each weight in 4 bits instead of 16, reducing memory by 4x with minimal accuracy loss.
questions.explanationZh: 量化 (Quantization) 将高精度浮点权重 (floating point weights) 映射为低精度整数 (integers)。INT4 量化 (INT4 quantization) 使用 4 位 (bits) 而非 16 位来存储每个权重，在精度损失 (accuracy loss) 极小的情况下将内存占用降低 4 倍。

questions.question: What is the key difference between post-training quantization (PTQ) and quantization-aware training (QAT)?
questions.questionZh: 训练后量化（Post-Training Quantization, PTQ）与量化感知训练（Quantization-Aware Training, QAT）的核心区别是什么？
options: PTQ quantizes after training with no retraining; QAT simulates quantization during training so the model learns to tolerate reduced precision
optionsZh: 训练后量化（PTQ）精度更高。
训练后量化（PTQ）在训练完成后直接进行量化，无需重新训练；量化感知训练（QAT）则在训练过程中模拟量化操作，使模型能够适应精度降低的情况。
量化感知训练（Quantization-Aware Training）不使用梯度（gradients）。
训练后量化 (Post-Training Quantization) 需要更多数据
questions.explanation: PTQ is fast (just calibrate and quantize) but can lose accuracy. QAT includes fake quantization during training, allowing the model to adjust its weights to be more robust to precision loss. QAT usually gives better accuracy.
questions.explanationZh: 训练后量化（PTQ）速度很快（只需进行校准和量化），但可能会损失精度（Accuracy）。量化感知训练（QAT）在训练过程中引入了伪量化（Fake Quantization），使模型能够调整其权重，从而对精度损失具有更强的鲁棒性。通常情况下，QAT 能够提供更高的精度。

questions.question: What does 'per-channel' quantization mean and why is it better than 'per-tensor'?
questions.questionZh: “逐通道量化（per-channel quantization）”是什么意思？为什么它比“逐张量化（per-tensor quantization）”更好？
options: It quantizes each output channel separately, using different scale/zero-point for each, reducing quantization error
It processes one color channel at a time
It uses separate GPUs per channel
It's a type of data parallelism
optionsZh: 它对每个输出通道 (output channel) 分别进行量化，为各通道使用不同的缩放因子/零点 (scale/zero-point)，从而降低量化误差 (quantization error)。
它每次处理一个颜色通道 (color channel)。
每个通道（channel）均使用独立的图形处理器（GPU）。
这是一种数据并行（Data Parallelism）。
questions.explanation: Per-tensor uses one scale factor for the entire weight matrix. Per-channel uses a separate scale for each output channel (row). Since different channels have different value ranges, per-channel captures them more accurately.
questions.explanationZh: 逐张量（Per-tensor）方式为整个权重矩阵（weight matrix）使用一个缩放因子（scale factor）。逐通道（Per-channel）方式为每个输出通道（output channel）（即行）使用独立的缩放因子。由于不同通道的数值范围各不相同，逐通道方式能够更准确地捕捉这些差异。

questions.question: Why do 95% of weights in Llama 3 70B fall between -0.1 and +0.1?
questions.questionZh: 为什么 Llama 3 70B 中 95% 的权重 (weights) 都落在 -0.1 到 +0.1 之间？
options: Weight decay and normalization during training push weights toward small values, making the full FP16 range wasteful
This is specific to the Llama architecture
optionsZh: 模型 (Model) 训练不足。
训练过程中的权重衰减 (Weight decay) 与归一化 (Normalization) 会促使权重向较小的值收敛，从而导致完整的 FP16 数值范围 (FP16 range) 被浪费。
权重 (weights) 尚未收敛。
这是 Llama 架构 (Llama architecture) 所特有的。
questions.explanation: Weight decay regularization shrinks weights toward zero. Layer normalization keeps activations centered. Combined, they produce weight distributions concentrated near zero, making low-precision quantization effective.
questions.explanationZh: 权重衰减正则化（Weight Decay Regularization）使权重向零收缩。层归一化（Layer Normalization）使激活值（Activations）保持居中。两者结合后，会形成集中在零附近的权重分布（Weight Distributions），从而使低精度量化（Low-Precision Quantization）更为有效。
